title: Saribus brevifolius
taxonomy: Saribus brevifolius is classified as a species of palm tree in the family Arecaceae. It is a member of the genus Saribus, which is a part of the palm family. The genus Saribus is closely related to the genus Livistona. Saribus brevifolius is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is also cultivated in other parts of the world. As a member of the palm family, Saribus brevifolius is a monocot, meaning it has one cotyledon in its seedling stage.
uses: Saribus brevifolius, also known as the fan palm, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
